notes: Provider quota/cost guard must be checked before treating a live run as no-regret pilot evidence.

known_risks: Single active-actor measured window is a competence control, not no-regret-core completion.
No scenario-pressure family declared before the run; do not promote results as branch-preflight input.
Live provider path needs quota/cost guard evidence before a pilot batch is accepted.
stop_conditions: Stop if row artifacts contain predicted_delta or expected_outcome as target labels.
Stop if action/target dominance suggests repeated-loop collapse.
Stop if response windows are undefined or only inferred from prose.
Stop if scenario setup text determines labels by construction.
Stop if provider, server, or world setup blockers dominate the batch.
Stop after 1 cycles or 1 actions per cycle for this run configuration.
